records.stdout:
Top-level CLI parser for the guardrail3-rs binary

Usage: g3rs <COMMAND>

Commands:
  init      Writes repo or workspace setup
  validate  Reports repo or workspace validation findings
  help      Print this message or the help of the given subcommand(s)

Options:
  -h, --help  Print help

G3RS enforces Rust repo setup and Rust workspace guardrails.

Start here:
  g3rs init repo
  g3rs init workspace --path <path>
  g3rs validate repo
  g3rs validate workspace --path <path>

Concepts:
  repo       Git repository surface: hooks, repo-level topology, marker pairs.
  workspace  One adopted Rust unit: Cargo.toml plus guardrail3-rs.toml.

Rules:
  init writes setup.
  validate only reports.
  validate repo checks that Git will run G3RS.
  validate workspace checks one Rust unit.

Deleted command shapes:
  g3rs validate-repo
  g3rs validate --path <path>

Reports repo or workspace validation findings

Usage: g3rs validate <COMMAND>

Commands:
  repo       Validates repository-level guardrails
  workspace  Validates one workspace root against the selected families
  help       Print this message or the help of the given subcommand(s)

Options:
  -h, --help  Print help

Writes repo or workspace setup

Usage: g3rs init <COMMAND>

Commands:
  repo       Bootstraps repo-level hook guardrails
  workspace  Bootstraps one adopted Rust workspace or package root
  help       Print this message or the help of the given subcommand(s)

Options:
  -h, --help  Print help

rerun with --force to insert the G3RS managed block

records.stdout:
initialized workspace
created guardrail3-rs.toml
validated with: g3rs validate workspace --path .
scope: workspace
root: .

== toolchain ==
[Error] g3rs-toolchain/exists rust-toolchain.toml rust-toolchain.toml missing
  Expected rust-toolchain.toml at workspace root. Create a `rust-toolchain.toml` with a `[toolchain]` section containing `channel` and `components`.
== fmt ==
[Error] g3rs-fmt/rustfmt-config-exists rustfmt.toml rustfmt config missing
  Expected `rustfmt.toml` at workspace root. Create one with the required formatting settings.
== cargo ==
[Error] g3rs-cargo/workspace-lints Cargo.toml rust lint table missing
  `Cargo.toml` must define `[lints.rust]`. Add the required lint entries to `[lints.rust]`.
[Error] g3rs-cargo/workspace-lints Cargo.toml clippy lint table missing
  `Cargo.toml` must define `[lints.clippy]`. Add the required lint entries to `[lints.clippy]`.
[Error] g3rs-cargo/workspace-metadata Cargo.toml edition missing
  `Cargo.toml` must declare an edition for this workspace root. Add `edition = "2024"` to the package metadata.
[Error] g3rs-cargo/rust-version-aware-resolver Cargo.toml resolver 2 lacks rust-version fallback
  `Cargo.toml` uses `resolver = "2"`. Add `.cargo/config.toml` with `[resolver] incompatible-rust-versions = "fallback"`, or move the workspace to `resolver = "3"`.
[Error] g3rs-cargo/rust-version-policy Cargo.toml library rust-version missing
  Library crates must declare `rust-version` (minimum supported Rust version). Add `rust-version = "1.75"` (or appropriate version) to `[package]`.
== clippy ==
[Error] g3rs-clippy/coverage-exists clippy.toml workspace root uncovered by clippy config
  Add `clippy.toml` or `.clippy.toml` at the workspace root so clippy policy is not left to defaults.
== deny ==
[Error] g3rs-deny/coverage - workspace root uncovered by deny config
  workspace root `.` is not covered by any allowed deny config.
== deps ==
[Info] g3rs-deps/cargo-lock-present Cargo.lock Cargo.lock missing
  Library-profile workspace is missing `Cargo.lock`.
== release ==
[Warn] g3rs-release/release-plz-workflow Cargo.toml Release-plz workflow missing
  No workflow contains an actual release-plz execution step. Add a release-plz step to a GitHub Actions workflow.
[Warn] g3rs-release/publish-dry-run-workflow Cargo.toml Publish dry-run workflow missing
  No workflow contains an actual `cargo publish --dry-run` step. Add a `cargo publish --dry-run` step to a CI workflow.
[Warn] g3rs-release/registry-token Cargo.toml CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN missing from workflows
  No workflow structurally wires `CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN` into release steps. Add `CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN` as a secret in the release workflow.
